name: FormaNova
description: AI platform for jewelry photoshoots and text-to-CAD generation. Upload a jewelry product image to generate professional model photoshoot renders, or describe jewelry in text to receive a 3D CAD model.

tools.name: jewelry_photoshoot
tools.description: Upload a jewelry product image to generate professional AI photoshoot renders on models or mannequins. Supports rings, necklaces, earrings, bracelets, and watches.

imageUrl.description: URL of the jewelry product image

tools.name: text_to_cad
tools.description: Generate a 3D jewelry CAD model from a natural language description

prompt.description: Natural language description of the jewelry piece to model
